info.title: IconResizeUtility
info.description: Dotnet global tool to resize icons for android and ios development

options.name: --srcFolder
options.description: Folder where the source images are located

options.name: --dstFolder
options.description: Folder where the results image are written to

options.name: --iconSize
options.description: Optional, provide specific icon size. If non provided the default sizes where used. e.g. 18,24,48

options.name: --postfixSize
options.description: Optional, postfix icon size. Required if multiple sizes where choosen

options.name: --csproj
options.description: Optional, full path to the Xamarin .csproj file where the icons should be added

options.name: --color
options.description: Optional, single color like "#55FF5560" or multiple colors like "{"red":"#FF0000","green":"#00FF00"}"

options.name: --doNotRename
options.description: Avoid replacing invalid characters in the icon name with an '_'

options.name: --useCache
options.description: Use cache to improve resize performance
